original_text: Margin profiles remain robust throughout the reporting period, reflecting Adobe's strong pricing power and operational efficiency. Q4 2025 gross margin reached 88.92% (K003), calculated from gross profit of $5,508,000,000 (C011) on revenue of $6,194,000,000 (C010). Operating margin stood at 36.50% (K004) based on operating income of $2,261,000,000 (C012), while net margin was 29.96% (K005) with net income of $1,856,000,000 (C013). These margin levels suggest Adobe maintains its characteristic high-margin software business model despite revenue headwinds in earlier quarters.
revised_text: Margin profiles remain robust throughout the reporting period, reflecting Adobe's strong pricing power and operational efficiency. Q4 2025 gross margin reached 88.92% (K003), calculated from gross profit of $5,508,000,000 (C013) on revenue of $6,194,000,000 (C012). Operating margin stood at 36.50% (K004) based on operating income of $2,261,000,000 (C014), while net margin was 29.96% (K005) with net income of $1,856,000,000 (C015). These margin levels suggest Adobe maintains its characteristic high-margin software business model.
changes_summary: Fixed four critical citation mismatches: (1) Changed gross profit citation from C011 to C013, (2) Changed revenue citation from C010 to C012, (3) Changed operating income citation from C012 to C014, (4) Changed net income citation from C013 to C015. Removed the unsupported claim about 'revenue headwinds in earlier quarters' as it was flagged as hallucination with no supporting evidence in cited chunks.
